response.text:
REJECT

rationale: r4c4's SoC is 0.15 below your 0.6 threshold (implying ~0.45 SoC), but your belief that all geographic neighbors are in persistent deficit means accepting this request would deplete your buffer below safe operating margins; prioritize your own charging to threshold before resuming outbound sharing.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r4c4. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.15 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: All geographic neighbors are in persistent energy deficit; r3c4 must halt outbound sharing and focus entirely on charging to 60% SoC before resuming any coordination..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
